name: First Steps
description: Learn the basics of combat. Master movement and basic attacks.
note: Your first battle. Learn the fundamentals of tactical combat.

name: Warrior's Trial
description: Face basic enemies and test your warrior skills.
note: Test your skills against a balanced enemy team.

name: Archer's Test
description: Master ranged combat with precision and tactics.
note: Focus on tactical positioning and ranged attacks.

name: Forest Ambush
description: Survive the darkness and enemy ambushes in the forest.
note: The forest is dangerous. Stay alert and use cover wisely.

name: Ancient Guardian
description: Face the ancient forest guardian in epic combat.
note: The Ancient Guardian protects the forest. Defeat it to proceed.

name: Mystic Clearing
description: Magical enemies await in this mystical battleground.
note: Magical energies surge in this mystical location.

name: Rocky Ascent
description: Climb the treacherous mountain paths while fighting foes.
note: The mountain path is steep and enemies are fierce.

name: Dragon's Lair
description: Enter the dragon's domain and face the ancient beast.
note: The dragon's lair. Only the brave survive this encounter.

name: Summit Battle
description: Reach the mountain peak in this ultimate test.
note: The summit awaits. Prove your worth in this challenging battle.

name: Arena Champion
description: Face the reigning arena champion in single combat.
note: The arena champion awaits. Show no mercy.

name: Master's Trial
description: The ultimate test of skill against multiple masters.
note: Multiple master warriors test your skills simultaneously.

name: ARENA MASTER
description: Become the ultimate champion of the battle arena!
note: The final battle. Defeat the Arena Master to claim ultimate victory!
